reasoning: Apple sprite exhibits strong internal color harmony aligned with Echoes-tuned palette. Overall mood is unambiguously BRIGHT and WARM: classic complementary red-green pairing with warm orange accent. No cold corporate tones, no desaturated muddy areas, no goth near-blacks detected. Palette compatibility is high — all hues present in the reference swatch sheet.
